name: Abelard, Peter
desc: Scholastic logician; nominalism, ethics of intention.

name: Adorno, Theodor
desc: Frankfurt School; negative dialectics, culture-industry critique.

name: Al-Farabi
desc: “Second Teacher”; political philosophy, Aristotelian logic in Islam.

name: Al-Ghazali
desc: Critiqued the philosophers; revived Sufism within orthodoxy.

name: Al-Kindi
desc: First Arab Peripatetic; introduced Greek philosophy to Islam.

name: Albert the Great
desc: Scholastic; integrated Aristotle, teacher of Aquinas.

name: Ambedkar, B. R.
desc: Social philosopher of caste and equality; Navayana Buddhism.

name: Amo, Anton Wilhelm
desc: Argued the body, not the mind, bears sensation.

name: Anscombe, G. E. M.
desc: Intention, action theory; revived virtue ethics.

name: Appiah, Kwame Anthony
desc: Cosmopolitanism, race, identity, ethics of culture.

name: Aquinas, Thomas
desc: Synthesis of Aristotle and Christianity; natural law.

name: Arendt, Hannah
desc: Political theory; totalitarianism, action, banality of evil.

name: Aristotle
desc: Logic, metaphysics, ethics, biology; vast systematic influence.

name: Armstrong, David
desc: Materialist theory of mind; universals, states of affairs.

name: Atisha
desc: Indian master who revived Buddhism in Tibet.

name: Augustine of Hippo
desc: Christian Platonism; will, time, original sin.

name: Aurelius, Marcus
desc: Stoic emperor; Meditations on virtue and duty.

name: Aurobindo, Sri
desc: Integral Yoga; spiritual evolution of consciousness.

name: Averroes (Ibn Rushd)
desc: Great commentator on Aristotle; reason and faith.

name: Berkeley, George
desc: Subjective idealism; “to be is to be perceived.”

name: Block, Ned
desc: Philosophy of mind; access vs. phenomenal consciousness.

name: Boethius
desc: Consolation of Philosophy; transmitted logic to medievals.

name: Brentano, Franz
desc: Intentionality; revived for philosophy of mind.

name: Buddha (Siddhartha Gautama)
desc: Founder of Buddhism; Four Noble Truths, anatta.

name: Butler, Joseph
desc: Conscience, moral psychology; critique of egoism.

name: Camus, Albert
desc: The absurd; revolt, ethics of life.

name: Carneades
desc: Academic Skeptic; probabilism, critique of dogmatism.

name: Chalmers, David
desc: Framed the “hard problem” of consciousness; property dualism.

name: Chrysippus
desc: Second founder of Stoicism; propositional logic.

name: Cicero
desc: Roman eclectic; transmitted Greek philosophy, natural law.

name: Crescas, Hasdai
desc: Critique of Aristotelian physics; divine infinity.

name: Dai Zhen
desc: Qing evidential scholar; critiqued Neo-Confucian metaphysics.

name: Democritus
desc: Atomism; reality is atoms and void.

name: Dignaga
desc: Founder of Buddhist logic; apoha theory of meaning.

name: Diogenes of Sinope

name: Du Châtelet, Émilie

name: Dworkin, Ronald
desc: Law as integrity; rights, political morality.

name: Eckhart, Meister
desc: Christian mysticism; ground of the soul.

name: Epictetus
desc: Stoic; dichotomy of control, ethics of self-mastery.

name: Fodor, Jerry
desc: Language of thought; modularity of mind.

name: Foot, Philippa
desc: Virtue ethics; trolley problem, natural goodness.

name: Frege, Gottlob
desc: Founder of modern logic; sense and reference.

name: Fricker, Miranda
desc: Epistemic injustice; testimonial and hermeneutical injustice.

name: Gautama, Aksapada
desc: Reputed founder of Nyaya logic; Nyaya Sutras.

name: Gersonides
desc: Jewish Aristotelian; divine foreknowledge and free will.

name: Habermas, Jürgen
desc: Communicative action; discourse ethics, public sphere.

name: Han Fei
desc: Leading Legalist theorist of statecraft and law.

name: Haslanger, Sally
desc: Social construction of gender and race; ameliorative analysis.

name: Hayashi Razan

name: Hegel, G. W. F.
desc: Absolute idealism; dialectic, phenomenology of spirit.

desc: Being and Time; fundamental ontology, Dasein.

desc: Frankfurt School; critical theory, instrumental reason.

desc: Founder of historiography and sociology; asabiyya.

desc: Pragmatism; truth, will to believe, psychology.

name: Jinul

desc: Kuzari; critique of philosophy, defense of revelation.

name: Kuhn, Thomas
desc: Paradigm shifts; structure of scientific revolutions.

name: Kukai

name: Lacan, Jacques

name: Langer, Susanne

name: Locke, John
desc: Empiricism; tabula rasa, social contract, toleration.

name: Lu Xiangshan
desc: Neo-Confucian; founder of School of Mind.

name: Lucretius
desc: Epicurean poet; De Rerum Natura, atomism.

name: Mariátegui, José Carlos
desc: Marxist analysis of Peruvian and indigenous reality.

desc: Analytic interpreter of Nyaya logic and epistemology.

desc: Moral philosophy; critique of scientism, human nature.

desc: Women's rights and liberty; collaborator with J.S. Mill.

name: Mohanty, J. N.
desc: Phenomenology bridging Husserl and Indian philosophy.

desc: Common sense, open question argument; founder of analytic.

name: Mozi
desc: Founder of Mohism; impartial care, consequentialism.

name: Mudimbe, V. Y.

name: Murdoch, Iris
desc: Moral vision; the good, attention, Platonism.

name: Nietzsche, Friedrich
desc: Will to power, genealogy of morals, eternal recurrence.

name: Nishida Kitaro

name: Ogyu Sorai
desc: Ancient Learning Confucian; Way of the sage-kings.

name: Parfit, Derek
desc: Personal identity, reasons; Reasons and Persons.

desc: Being is one and unchanging; founder of metaphysics.

name: Pettit, Philip
desc: Republican political theory; freedom as non-domination.

name: Plato
desc: Theory of Forms; foundational to Western philosophy.

name: Plotinus
desc: Founder of Neoplatonism; the One, emanation.

desc: Mimamsa; founder of the Prabhakara sub-school.

desc: Sophist; “man is the measure of all things.”

desc: Founder of Skepticism; suspension of judgment.

desc: Number as reality; transmigration of souls.

name: Quine, W. V. O.

name: Rawls, John

name: Rousseau, Jean-Jacques
desc: Social contract; general will, natural goodness.

name: Russell, Bertrand
desc: Logicism, theory of descriptions; Principia Mathematica.

name: Saadia Gaon
desc: First systematic Jewish philosopher; Jewish Kalam.

name: Scanlon, T. M.
desc: Contractualism; What We Owe to Each Other.

name: Schelling, F. W. J.
desc: German idealism; philosophy of nature, identity.

name: Schopenhauer, Arthur
desc: World as will and representation; pessimism.

name: Searle, John
desc: Speech acts; Chinese Room, social ontology.

desc: Myth of the given; scientific image of man.

name: Seneca
desc: Roman Stoic; ethics, letters on living.

name: Sextus Empiricus
desc: Pyrrhonist skeptic; chief source on ancient skepticism.

name: Shantarakshita

desc: Moral sentiments; wealth of nations, sympathy.

name: Sor Juana Inés de la Cruz
desc: Colonial Mexican proto-feminist; knowledge and reason.

name: Swinburne, Richard
desc: Natural theology; probabilistic arguments for God.

name: Tarski, Alfred
desc: Semantic theory of truth; model theory.

name: Taylor, Charles
desc: Communitarianism; sources of the self, secularity.

name: Thales
desc: First philosopher; water as first principle.

name: Thomson, Judith Jarvis
desc: Trolley problem; rights, the ethics of abortion.

name: Tsongkhapa
desc: Founder of Gelug school of Tibetan Buddhism.

name: Tusi, Nasir al-Din
desc: Polymath; ethics, logic, astronomy, Avicennan revival.

name: Uddyotakara

name: Umasvati
desc: Jain; Tattvartha Sutra, authoritative across sects.

name: Unamuno, Miguel de

name: Vatsyayana
desc: Author of Nyaya Bhasya, foundational Nyaya commentary.

desc: Neo-Vedanta; introduced Hindu philosophy to the West.

desc: Xuanxue; commentator on Daodejing and Yijing.

desc: School of Mind; unity of knowledge and action.

name: Warnock, Mary
desc: Applied ethics, philosophy of education, bioethics.

name: Watsuji Tetsuro
desc: Ethics as betweenness; climate and culture.

name: Williams, Bernard
desc: Critique of utilitarianism; moral luck, integrity.

name: Wollstonecraft, Mary
desc: Vindication of the Rights of Woman; early feminism.

name: Wonhyo
desc: Major Korean Buddhist; harmonized Mahayana doctrines.

name: Xenophanes
desc: Critique of anthropomorphic gods; early monotheism.

name: Xunzi
desc: Confucian; human nature needs correction, ritual.

name: Yashovijaya

desc: Philosophy of Latin American identity and history.

desc: Neo-Confucian; philosophy of qi, Western Inscription.

name: Zhu Xi
desc: Synthesizer of Neo-Confucian School of Principle.
